welcome.title: Welcome to MACMCleaner
welcome.subtitle: Select your preferred language to continue

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: Before continuing, please read and accept the following terms:
terms.s1: MACMCleaner is free software under the GPL v3 license. You may copy, distribute and modify the software as long as you publish any changes under the same license.
terms.s2: This software is provided "AS IS", without warranty of any kind. Use of this tool is at your own risk. The developer is not responsible for data loss or system damage resulting from use of the application.
terms.s3: MACMCleaner operates 100% offline. It does not collect, transmit or store any personal data on external servers. No telemetry, no tracking, no internet connections. Fully compliant with GDPR and Spain's LOPD (Organic Law 3/2018).
terms.s4: MACMCleaner will never delete critical system files. All files are shown for review before any deletion and confirmation is always required. The internal safety system blocks critical OS paths.
terms.accept: I accept the terms and conditions
terms.mustAccept: You must accept the terms to continue

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Keep your system clean and fast

results.title: Scan Results
results.subtitle: Select what you want to clean

confirm.title: Confirm cleanup
confirm.message: You are about to delete {{count}} files ({{size}}). This action cannot be undone.
confirm.warning: Make sure you have reviewed the selected files.

cleaning.title: Cleaning...
cleaning.errorsNote: Some files could not be deleted because they were in use (browser open, Windows services). This is completely normal. Close your browsers before the next scan for better results.

settings.title: Settings
settings.exclusionsDesc: Paths that will never be scanned or cleaned
settings.updatesDesc: MACMCleaner does not update automatically. Click the button to check for a new version on GitHub.
settings.uninstallDesc: Opens the Windows Apps panel to uninstall MACMCleaner.

about.title: About MACMCleaner
about.description: A safe, open-source, privacy-first system cleaner.
about.privacyText: MACMCleaner works 100% offline. It does not collect, transmit or store any personal data. No telemetry, no tracking, no internet connections.
about.disclaimerText: Software provided "as is", without warranties. Use is at the user's own risk.
about.sourceText: Available on GitHub under GPL v3
